text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Ah, damn it. The smell's stuck on me...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Those punks, they think that just 'cause the back
alleys are empty means they can go all-out.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
You get a smell that normies aren't used to
everywhere, and no duh people are gonna
notice...

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
But they just grill away, smoke be damned. I
swear, if that hole-in-the-wall robatayaki place
starts getting popular...
